data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $63.5334 million yesterday, with BlackRock's ETHA experiencing the largest net outflow at $58.9679 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $63.5334 million yesterday (January 27th, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was the Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF (ETH), with a net inflow of $9.9868 million. ETH's historical total net inflow has reached $1.653 billion. The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was the BlackRock ETF (ETHA), with a net outflow of $58.9679 million. ETHA's historical total net inflow has reached $12.427 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs is $18.154 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization) of 4.98%. The historical cumulative net inflow has reached $12.355 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $147 million yesterday, with BlackRock's IBIT experiencing the largest net outflow at $103 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $147 million yesterday (January 27th, Eastern Time). The BlackRock ETF (IBIT) experienced the largest single-day net outflow, at $103 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $62.816 billion. The Fidelity ETF (FBTC) followed with a net outflow of $44.5591 million, while its historical total net inflow is $11.415 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $114.989 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Bitcoin's total market capitalization) of 6.44%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $56.354 billion.

data.title: Vitalik Highlights Key Areas for AI and Crypto Integration
data.description: Vitalik, in an interview, discussed potential intersections between AI and cryptocurrency. According to Foresight News, he identified several promising areas for exploration. Firstly, AI's inability to open accounts with traditional banks makes cryptocurrency a viable option for AI agents needing funds to execute tasks. Secondly, AI can participate in prediction markets, offering more accurate information as traders. Lastly, blockchain technology can be used to verify whether content is created by humans or generated by AI.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Critiques Short-Term Bets on Prediction Markets
data.description:
Ethereum founder Vitalik Buterin recently shared his views on prediction markets during an interview with ForsightNews. According to BlockBeats, Buterin criticized platforms like Polymarket for promoting short-term bets such as 'which team will win next week' or 'whether Bitcoin's price will rise or fall in an hour.' He argued that these short-term wagers lack significant social value in the long run.

Buterin emphasized that while prediction markets are theoretically successful as tools, there is a need for more meaningful applications. Reflecting on his own experience, he revealed that he used $440,000 as principal last year on Polymarket and earned $70,000. His strategy involved identifying markets that had entered a 'crazy mode' and betting against the occurrence of irrational events. This approach, he noted, often proved profitable when market sentiment became irrational.

data.title: Bitwise Takes Initial Steps Toward Uniswap-Linked ETF
data.description:
Bitwise has established a Delaware statutory trust as a preliminary move towards launching an ETF linked to Uniswap. According to NS3.AI, this action does not involve an immediate filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The development comes after the SEC concluded its investigation into Uniswap Labs, indicating a shift in regulatory focus from enforcement to structural and liquidity aspects within the decentralized finance (DeFi) sector.

Industry experts highlight that custody and liquidity are crucial factors for the approval of such financial products. Uniswap’s UNI token continues to demonstrate strong trading volumes, although operational complexities remain a challenge. The evolving regulatory landscape suggests a growing interest in addressing these complexities to facilitate the integration of DeFi into traditional financial systems.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 3,000 USDT with a 1.82% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 28, 2026, 04:33 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 3,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 3,000.830078 USDT, with a narrowed 1.82% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 89,000 USDT with a 0.23% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 28, 2026, 04:34 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 89,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 89,014.25 USDT, with a narrowed 0.23% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Discusses Earnings and Prediction Market Challenges
data.description:
Vitalik Buterin revealed in an interview that he earned $70,000 last year on Polymarket, starting with a principal of $440,000. According to Foresight News, Buterin's strategy involved identifying markets that were in 'crazy mode' and betting that 'crazy things won't happen.' He focused on segments within Polymarket, including politics and technology.

Buterin also addressed potential oracle issues in prediction markets, suggesting two main solutions. The first is a centralized approach, which involves trusting a company, such as Bloomberg, to provide accurate information. The second is token voting, a decentralized method exemplified by UMA, although trust in UMA has recently declined. Buterin expressed hope for a better solution in the future.

data.title: Large Transfer of QNT Tokens Observed Between Anonymous Addresses
data.description: A significant transfer of QNT tokens has been recorded, involving two anonymous addresses. According to ChainCatcher, at 12:06, a total of 27,377.84 QNT tokens were moved from one anonymous address, beginning with 0x5560, to another, starting with 0xa0bA. The transaction highlights ongoing activity within the cryptocurrency market, emphasizing the movement of substantial amounts of digital assets between unidentified parties.

data.title: A whale spent $3 million to buy 90,700 HYPE tokens.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a DeBank whale named "Einstein" (0xc7B...C2Ff) withdrew 3 million USDC from Lighter and deposited them into Hyperliquid, then bought 90,780 HYPE at a price of $33.05.

data.title: PIPPIN contract price briefly broke through 0.55 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of nearly 70%.
data.description: OKX market data shows that the PIPPIN contract price briefly surged above 0.55 USDT before falling back to 0.53 USDT, representing a 24-hour increase of 69.32%. Previously, it was reported that a market maker suspected to be from Wintermute purchased $200,000 worth of PIPPIN tokens on January 23.

data.title: Moonbirds (BIRB) will soon launch Bybit spot trading, Alpha, and Byreal.
data.description: According to official sources, Bybit will list Moonbirds (BIRB) on its spot, Alpha, and Byreal platforms. Users can quickly trade without setting up a separate wallet simply by logging into Bybit Alpha and track the market prices of popular tokens in real time. Byreal is a DEX (decentralized exchange) built on Solana, achieving stable trade execution and an efficient liquidity market-making experience through granular liquidity distribution and a fast on-chain confirmation mechanism. BIRB is a brand token for the collectibles ecosystem, aiming to connect blue-chip intellectual property (IP) with physical businesses.

data.title: An address deposited 139,000 LINK tokens into Binance, with an estimated loss of $520,000.
data.description: According to The Data Nerd, eight hours ago, an address (0x8c6d...7cE9) deposited 139,000 LINK tokens into Binance, worth approximately $1.67 million. This address purchased these tokens eight months ago at an average price of $15.70. If sold at the current price, the actual loss would reach $520,000.

data.title: AetheriumX completes $8 million strategic financing to accelerate the development of its Web3 finance and interactive economy ecosystem.
data.description: AetheriumX, a Web3 project based on the Distributed Capital Intelligence Protocol (DCIP), announced the completion of an $8 million strategic funding round. This round was jointly conducted by CGV, GAINS Associates, DuckDAO, and Genesis Capital, marking AetheriumX's official entry into a strategic development phase centered on ecosystem-driven growth. AetheriumX stated that the funds will be primarily used for the following: first, continuously optimizing the Distributed Capital Intelligence Protocol (DCIP) and its strategy execution network, and expanding core modules such as DeFi, GameFi, prediction markets, and the creator economy; second, launching and accelerating an ecosystem fund to support the incubation and growth of developers, studios, and community nodes; and third, advancing its ecosystem layout in the Asia-Pacific region, focusing on the Japanese and South Korean markets, and strengthening community building and regional cooperation. The project team emphasized that AetheriumX is committed to building a long-term, sustainable, and truly participatory Web3 ecosystem, rather than relying on a growth model based on short-term incentives. Unlike traditional single-revenue platforms, AetheriumX is a composable and evolvable on-chain interactive growth system built on DCIP. Through a programmable strategy execution layer, it transforms passive revenue into a continuously engaging ecosystem growth process. In its ecosystem design, AetheriumX adopts a dual-token structure: AXT is primarily used for ecosystem participation and strategy execution mapping, while VEXA handles governance, risk control, and ecosystem collaboration to support long-term collaboration and stable system operation. The AetheriumX team stated that from the project's inception, it was designed around auditability, governance, and scalability to ensure that revenue, participation, and governance processes are all verifiable on-chain. This round of strategic financing will further solidify its infrastructure, connecting more developers, creators, and community contributors. 2026 will mark the official launch of AetheriumX's ecosystem strategy, propelling the project from the basic validation phase to large-scale ecosystem expansion. (The Block)

data.title: Farcaster founder: We had hoped to issue a token for Farcaster, but the right time didn't come.
data.description: In response to a post on social media by Dan Romero, founder of the decentralized social protocol Farcaster, saying "something I couldn't say publicly before the acquisition but can now say openly," he stated that he had hoped to launch a token for Farcaster but had never been able to wait for the right time to do so.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Report Highlights Investor Optimism Amid Geopolitical Risks
data.description: A Goldman Sachs report indicates that despite rising geopolitical risks, investor risk appetite remains high. According to ChainCatcher, the market appears to have adequately absorbed macroeconomic risks, with investor optimism currently at approximately the 67th percentile. The proprietary risk appetite index has reached its highest level since April 2021. Funds are increasingly flowing into high-risk assets, with a positive stance on stock allocations. Additionally, international funds are accelerating their inflow into Europe, Japan, and emerging markets.

data.title: Moltbot's Sudden Rise: A Personal Project Turns Into a Digital Phenomenon
data.description:
PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter) about the unexpected popularity of Moltbot, previously known as Clawdbot, which has captured widespread attention recently. The founder, @steipete, revealed in a conversation with @tbpn that the project was not a team effort but rather a personal endeavor born out of burnout. He described the AI agent not merely as software but as a 'digital life form' capable of understanding, acting, and using a computer as its body.

Following its viral success, the project faced a surge of security emails, an overwhelmed Discord server, and a request from Anthropic to change its name. The renaming process was even disrupted by script bots attempting to hijack the account, adding to the drama.

The detailed conversation provides a comprehensive overview of Moltbot's journey and explores why AI agents have suddenly become a central narrative in technology discussions.

data.title: Tether's Strategic Expansion in Gold Market Amid Geopolitical Shifts
data.description:
Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino has indicated that the company's role in the gold market is set to expand as geopolitical rivals of the United States may introduce a gold-backed alternative to the dollar. According to Odaily, Ardoino highlighted Tether's ongoing strategy to reinvest substantial company profits into gold assets, maintaining a weekly purchase rate of 1 to 2 tons of gold, with plans to continue this approach in the coming months.

Ardoino disclosed that Tether currently holds nearly 140 tons of gold, stored in a nuclear bunker in Switzerland built during the Cold War. This reserve is one of the largest known single gold holdings globally, outside of central banks, ETFs, and commercial banks. With recent increases in the prices of gold and other precious metals, the value of Tether's gold holdings has surpassed $23.3 billion.

Furthermore, Ardoino mentioned that Tether is assessing market conditions and trading strategies, aiming to capture arbitrage opportunities through more active gold trading. The company has recently hired two experienced gold traders from HSBC to advance its physical gold market operations.

data.title: Ripple Treasury Platform Launched to Enhance Corporate Cash Management
data.description: Ripple's subsidiary, GTreasury, has introduced the Ripple Treasury platform to modernize cash and liquidity management for businesses. According to PANews, the platform integrates traditional treasury functions with enterprise-level digital asset infrastructure. It utilizes AI predictive analytics, real-time reconciliation, and global liquidity management to streamline financial operations for corporate teams. Ripple Treasury offers 24/7 cross-border payments, institutional custody, and dual management of fiat and digital assets. The platform aims to eliminate the need for pre-funded accounts, reduce foreign exchange costs, and unlock working capital for global enterprises.

data.title: Binance Offers P2P Ad Bidding Fee Discounts for African Merchants
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is launching a P2P Featured Ad Bidding Fee Discount campaign specifically for P2P merchants in Africa. This initiative aims to provide bidding fee discounts during the campaign period, which spans from 2026-01-28 00:00 (UTC) to 2026-02-25 23:59 (UTC). Merchants can participate by logging into the Binance P2P Merchant Portal, selecting their preferred fiat currency, and placing a bid to automatically receive the fee discount.

The fee discount structure is designed to benefit both first-time and existing bidders. First-time bidders, defined as users who have never completed a successful bidding order before 2026-01-28 00:00 (UTC), will receive a 30% discount on their entire bid submission. For instance, if a user submits a bid for six hours and their bids are successful, they will enjoy a 30% discount on all winning bids for that submission. Existing bidders, whose last successful bid was more than six months ago, will receive a 20% discount on their entire bid submission under similar conditions.

The discount will automatically apply to each submission, and all winning bids within the same submission will receive the discount. Users are encouraged to familiarize themselves with the bidding process by watching the available video tutorial in English. They can track their first winning bid and attempt multiple discounted bids in a cycle until they win. All bids must comply with Binance’s P2P terms and policies. This promotion is applicable to verified P2P merchants in Africa who have received official notifications via app push, inmail, or email. Binance reserves the right to disqualify participants involved in dishonest behavior or tampering with program code.
